About Me

Designing with empathy.
Building with purpose.

I'm a self-taught UX/UI designer and app developer. I design and build products that solve real human problems — because I've lived those problems myself.

I work across the full design process: from user research and PACT analysis to wireframing, design systems, and high-fidelity prototyping in Figma — and then I keep going and actually build it.

Selected Work

Project 01 — Community App

Roots

Connecting immigrants and expats with local events and community in Norway

Sole Designer & Developer
Figma, React Native
Live — rootsapp.no
Apr 2025 – Present
Welcome
Home Feed
Find Events

Figma workspace — design system, wireframes, and hi-fi screens

Design Process

01
Research
02
Define
03
Wireframe
04
Hi-Fi Design
05
Build & Ship

The Problem

Solo immigrants in Norway face isolation and loneliness. According to Statistics Norway (SSB), 9% of immigrants are severely bothered by loneliness vs 5% of the general population. Information about local events is scattered across Facebook, NGO newsletters, and Discord chats — all in Norwegian, with no single reliable platform for newcomers.

Key Design Decisions

  • Dual discovery: category browsing + proximity filtering
  • Personalized onboarding with language & interest preferences
  • Error state coverage — payment failure, empty states, edge cases
  • Central FAB for quick event creation always accessible
  • Full end-to-end flow: discover → ticket → QR check-in
Research Foundation

This project began as a UiA school assignment using the PACT framework. I conducted semi-structured interviews with solo immigrants in Kristiansand and distributed questionnaires to capture broader patterns. The design is grounded in SSB data on immigrant loneliness. When school stopped — I kept going and built it.

Project 02 — Faith Community App

Koinos

Faith community platform — Bible, church finder, worship playlists, and connection

Sole Designer & Developer
Figma, React Native
In Development — koinos.faith
2026 – Present
Today's Verse
Bible Reader
Explore — Books
Worship Playlist

The Concept

Koinos (Greek: 'common' or 'together') is a faith community platform for people who are searching, returning, or deepening their belief. It brings Bible search, church finding, worship playlists, curated books and podcasts, and a community feed — into one warm, accessible app.

Design Highlights

  • Warm beige + teal palette — calm, safe, non-institutional feel
  • Verse of the Day as the central daily touchpoint
  • Bible reader with version switcher (NIV) and phrase search
  • Explore section: Books, Worship, Podcasts with smart filtering
  • Community feed designed for vulnerability and openness
Built-in Social Impact

Koinos Unlimited is $5.99/month — and 50% goes directly to vetted nonprofits worldwide. This isn't just a feature, it's the foundation of the product's identity: faith in action, not just faith as content. Every dollar tracked and reported transparently.

Let's build something
that matters.

I'm early in my career and there's a lot to learn — but I bring curiosity, initiative, and a genuine belief that good design can change how people experience the world.
